ddls:
CREATE TABLE "polls" (
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll */,
  "subgroup" TEXT /* Subgroup of the poll (e.g., All polls) */,
  "startdate" TEXT /* Start date of the poll */,
  "enddate" TEXT /* End date of the poll */,
  "pollster" TEXT /* Pollster conducting the poll */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the pollster (e.g., A+, B+) */,
  "samplesize" INTEGER /* Sample size of the poll */,
  "population" TEXT /* Population being polled (e.g., lv, rv) */,
  "weight" REAL /* Weight of the poll */,
  "influence" REAL /* Influence of the poll */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region or state where the poll was conducted */,
  "methodology" TEXT /* Method used to conduct the poll (e.g., phone, online, in-person) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the poll data (e.g., API, manual entry) */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the poll */,
  "is_active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the poll is currently active or archived */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_pollster FOREIGN KEY ("pollster") REFERENCES pollsters ("pollster_name"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_polls_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "pollsters" (
  "pollster_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each pollster */,
  "pollster_name" TEXT /* Name of the pollster */,
  "grade" TEXT /* Grade of the pollster (e.g., A+, B+) */,
  "bias" REAL /* Bias of the pollster */,
  "accuracy" REAL /* Accuracy of the pollster */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email of the pollster */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the pollster */,
  "website" TEXT /* Website URL of the pollster */,
  "founding_year" INTEGER /* Year the pollster was founded */,
  "description" TEXT /* Brief description of the pollster */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("pollster_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each poll result */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "dem" REAL /* Percentage of Democratic votes */,
  "rep" REAL /* Percentage of Republican votes */,
  "adjusted_dem" REAL /* Adjusted percentage of Democratic votes */,
  "adjusted_rep" REAL /* Adjusted percentage of Republican votes */,
  "other_party" REAL /* Percentage of votes for other parties */,
  "undecided" REAL /* Percentage of undecided voters */,
  "margin_of_error" REAL /* Margin of error for the poll results */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level of the poll results */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_results_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "questions" (
  "question_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each question */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "question_text" TEXT /* Text of the question */,
  "question_type" TEXT /* Type of the question (e.g., multiple choice, open-ended) */,
  "question_source" TEXT /* Source of the question (e.g., internal, external) */,
  "question_language" TEXT /* Language in which the question was asked */,
  "question_topic" TEXT /* Category of the question topic (e.g., economy, healthcare) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("question_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_questions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "responses" (
  "response_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each response */,
  "question_id" INTEGER /* ID of the question */,
  "response_text" TEXT /* Text of the response */,
  "response_type" TEXT /* Type of the response (e.g., answer, comment) */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the response was recorded */,
  "response_demographics" TEXT /* Demographic information of the respondent (e.g., age, gender) */,
  "response_validity" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the response is valid or flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("response_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_responses_question_id FOREIGN KEY ("question_id") REFERENCES questions ("question_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "elections" (
  "election_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election */,
  "election_type" TEXT /* Type of the election (e.g., presidential, congressional) */,
  "election_date" TEXT /* Date of the election */,
  "election_cycle" TEXT /* Election cycle (e.g., 2020, 2022) */,
  "election_type_detail" TEXT /* More detailed information about the election type (e.g., primary, general) */,
  "is_special" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the election is a special election */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("election_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "candidates" (
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each candidate */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the candidate */,
  "party" TEXT /* Party affiliation of the candidate */,
  "candidate_bio" TEXT /* Brief biography of the candidate */,
  "candidate_image_url" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's image */,
  "is_incumbent" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate is an incumbent */,
  "candidate_website" TEXT /* URL of the candidate's website */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "election_results" (
  "result_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each election result */,
  "election_id" INTEGER /* ID of the election */,
  "candidate_id" INTEGER /* ID of the candidate */,
  "votes" INTEGER /* Number of votes received by the candidate */,
  "percentage_votes" REAL /* Percentage of votes received by the candidate */,
  "is_winner" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the candidate won the election */,
  "result_source" TEXT /* Source of the election results (e.g., official, projected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("result_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_election_id FOREIGN KEY ("election_id") REFERENCES elections ("election_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_election_results_candidate_id FOREIGN KEY ("candidate_id") REFERENCES candidates ("candidate_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the user */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role was assigned to the user */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the role assignment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the permission was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_permissions_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_comments" (
  "comment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each comment */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the comment */,
  "comment_text" TEXT /* Text of the comment */,
  "comment_date" TEXT /* Date of the comment */,
  "is_approved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been approved for display */,
  "is_flagged" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the comment has been flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("comment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_comments_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user making the rating */,
  "rating" REAL /* Rating of the poll (e.g., 1-5) */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date of the rating */,
  "is_valid" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rating is valid or flagged for review */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_ratings_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_tags" (
  "tag_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tag */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "tag_name" TEXT /* Name of the tag */,
  "tag_description" TEXT /* Description of the tag */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tag_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tags_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_urls" (
  "url_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each URL */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "url" TEXT /* URL of the poll */,
  "url_type" TEXT /* Type of URL (e.g., source, report, article) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("url_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_urls_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_multiversions" (
  "multiverse_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each multiverse version */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "multiverse_version" TEXT /* Version of the multiverse */,
  "is_latest" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the multiverse version is the latest */,
  "version_notes" TEXT /* Notes about the multiverse version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("multiverse_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_multiversions_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "poll_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking entry */,
  "poll_id" INTEGER /* ID of the poll */,
  "tracking_type" TEXT /* Type of tracking (e.g., live, pending) */,
  "tracking_status" TEXT /* More detailed status information (e.g., live, pending, completed) */,
  "tracking_source" TEXT /* Source of the tracking information (e.g., pollster, system) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_poll_tracking_poll_id FOREIGN KEY ("poll_id") REFERENCES polls ("poll_id")
)
